title: Pack of 2 Christmas Beer Bottle Gift Bags 6 Compartments Per Bag - Red Blue Festive Design Gift Present Cider Ale Drinks Wine Prosecco - Carrier Handles With Tag
features: Each pack includes two beer-themed gift bags in stylish designs, offering a sophisticated and convenient way to present bottles, cans, or small gift bundles.
Made from strong 210gsm paper, these eco-friendly bags are durable, plastic-free, and a sustainable alternative without compromising on quality or strength.
Features soft cotton ribbon handles for comfortable carrying and a matt laminated tag that can be personalised with a name or message for a thoughtful touch.
Measuring 17.5cm x 23.5cm x 13.5cm, these versatile gift bags are perfect for birthdays, festive celebrations, Father’s Day, or any beer-themed occasion.
Practical, reusable, and designed with attention to detail, these gift bags not only reduce waste but also ensure your gift-giving looks polished and memorable.
description: Product Description Wrap Your Cheer in Style This Christmas Make every bottle gift-ready with YöL’s festive bottle bags, featuring bold Christmas designs and strong rope handles. Perfect for wine, prosecco, or craft drinks, they add instant seasonal charm to your celebrations and make gifting beautifully effortless. Stylish Seasonal Bottle Bags Add Cheer to Every Festive Gift Bring extra sparkle to your gifting with YöL festive bottle bags. Each design captures the joy of Christmas with vibrant colours, sturdy rope handles, and premium finishes—ideal for presenting wine, fizz, or craft drinks in true holiday style. Festive Bottle Bags for Every Celebration Raise a Glass to Holiday Cheer Add a touch of fun to your Christmas gifting with this “Deck the Halls” bottle bag. Perfect for presenting beer, cider, or festive fizz, its bold design, sturdy handles, and seasonal colours make it a joyful way to share drinks and good spirits this season. Share the Spirit of the Season Make gifting effortless with this eye-catching “Cold Beer & Christmas Cheer” bottle bag. Designed for easy carrying and vibrant presentation, it’s ideal for wrapping up bottled gifts and spreading festive joy at parties, gatherings, or Secret Santa exchanges.
